scripts.ios-dev-release:
bash -lc 'set -e; HOST_IP=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 2>/dev/null || ipconfig getifaddr en1 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$HOST_IP" ]; then echo "Could not determine LAN IP. Set HOST_IP env var."; exit 1; fi; BASE_URL_IOS="http://$HOST_IP:3001"; printf "APP_ENV=production
BASE_URL=%s
BASE_URL_IOS=%s
BASE_URL_ANDROID=%s
" "$BASE_URL_IOS" "$BASE_URL_IOS" "$BASE_URL_IOS" > .env.release.local; PREV_ENVFILE=$(cat /tmp/envfile 2>/dev/null || true); echo ".env.release.local" > /tmp/envfile; ENVFILE=.env.release.local xcodebuild INFOPLIST_KEY_CFBundleDisplayName="DEV Push Me Up" -workspace ios/PushMeUp.xcworkspace -scheme PushMeUp -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -derivedDataPath ios/build && ios-deploy --bundle ios/build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/PushMeUp.app; if [ -n "$PREV_ENVFILE" ]; then echo "$PREV_ENVFILE" > /tmp/envfile; fi'
scripts.ios-prod-release: bash -lc 'set -e; PREV_ENVFILE=$(cat /tmp/envfile 2>/dev/null || true); echo ".env.prod" > /tmp/envfile; ENVFILE=.env.prod xcodebuild INFOPLIST_KEY_CFBundleDisplayName="Push Me Up" -workspace ios/PushMeUp.xcworkspace -scheme PushMeUp -configuration Release -sdk iphoneos -derivedDataPath ios/build && ios-deploy --bundle ios/build/Build/Products/Release-iphoneos/PushMeUp.app; if [ -n "$PREV_ENVFILE" ]; then echo "$PREV_ENVFILE" > /tmp/envfile; fi'
scripts.ios-device-dev: BUILD_MODE=Debug APP_ENV_OVERRIDE=development SOURCE_ENVFILE=.env.dev START_METRO=true bash scripts/run-ios-device.sh
scripts.ios-device-release: BUILD_MODE=Release APP_ENV_OVERRIDE=production SOURCE_ENVFILE=.env.prod START_METRO=false bash scripts/run-ios-device.sh

_scriptComments.android: Run Android (dev env) with adb reverse for Metro/API and auto-recovery.
_scriptComments.format: Format all project files with Prettier.
_scriptComments.ios: Run the iOS app using development env values from .env.dev.
_scriptComments.lint:fix: Run ESLint and auto-fix safe issues.
_scriptComments.start: Start Metro bundler with cache reset using .env.dev.
_scriptComments.android-release: Build Android release APK with production env values from .env.prod.
_scriptComments.create-feature: Scaffold a new feature module using scripts/createFeature.js.
_scriptComments.create-sharedComponent: Scaffold a shared component using scripts/createSharedComponent.js.
_scriptComments.ios-dev-release: Build and deploy iOS Release (DEV app name) using LAN host URL in generated .env.release.local.
_scriptComments.ios-prod-release: Build and deploy iOS Release (prod app name) using production env values from .env.prod.
_scriptComments.ios-multi: Run helper script for launching multiple iOS simulators.
_scriptComments.ios-device-dev: Run iOS app on a connected physical device using Debug mode and .env.dev.
_scriptComments.ios-device-release: Run iOS app on a connected physical device using Release mode and .env.prod.
